name: Tiny Oriental Crips San Diego
description: The Tiny Oriental Crips (TOC) are an Asian/Laotian-American street gang based on the West Side of Linda Vista and parts of the Mira Mesa, in the Central neighborhood of San Diego, California. The Tiny Oriental Crips are primarily consist of Laotians, but also include Hmong and Vietnamese as well as descendants of Khmer.

sources.title: Tiny Oriental Crips San Diego — UnitedGangs
